childhood.familyBackground: Cen grew up in Beijing in a medical and academic family. His parents were prominent physicians and educators.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 첸은 베이징에서 의료 및 학문 가족에서 성장했다. 그의 부모는 저명한 의사이자 교육자였다.
childhood.earlyLife: Cen founded a pharmaceutical company focusing on traditional Chinese medicine combined with modern pharmaceutical research. His company became one of China's leading pharmaceutical firms.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 첸은 전통 중의학과 현대 제약 연구를 결합한 제약 회사를 설립했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded pharmaceutical company focused on TCM-modern pharma integration
careerTimeline.eventKo: TCM-현대 제약 통합에 초점을 맞춘 제약 회사 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded operations and became major Chinese pharmaceutical manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 운영을 확장하고 주요 중국 제약 제조사가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through pharmaceutical success
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제약 성공을 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Product safety concerns led to recalls and regulatory scrutiny
failures.descriptionKo: 제품 안전 우려로 인해 리콜 및 규제 감시 초래
failures.lesson: Quality control and product safety are non-negotiable in pharmaceuticals
failures.lessonKo: 제약에서 품질 관리 및 제품 안전은 양보할 수 없다

quotes.text: Combining traditional wisdom with modern science creates breakthrough medicines
quotes.textKo: 전통적 지혜와 현대 과학의 결합은 획기적 의약품을 만든다

recommended.title: The Healing Herbs of China
recommended.author: Various
recommended.note: Informed his integration of traditional and modern pharmaceutical approaches
recommended.noteKo: 전통 및 현대 제약 접근 방식의 통합을 알림

personalTraits.knownFor: Chinese pharmaceutical leadership; traditional medicine innovation; healthcare entrepreneurship
personalTraits.knownForKo: 중국 제약 리더십; 전통 의학 혁신; 의료 기업가정신
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports medical research and healthcare education in China
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 중국의 의료 연구 및 의료 교육 지원
